mapper.select:
select distinct u.id, u.name, u.department_id as departmentId, d.name as departmentName, u.position, u.enable, u.sync_status as syncStatus, u.sync_time as syncTime, u.create_time
order by u.create_time desc, u.id desc

select u.id, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.wecom_userid as wecomUserid, u.department_id as departmentId, d.name as departmentName, u.position, u.enable, u.sync_status as syncStatus, u.sync_time as syncTime from user u inner join user_role_relation urr on u.id = urr.user_id and urr.source_id = #{organizationId} left join department d on u.department_id = d.id and d.organization_id = #{organizationId} where u.deleted = 0 and u.id = #{userId} limit 1
